parameters.text:
=Extract structured data from this vendor invoice.

Vendor: {{ $json.vendorName }}

Invoice text:
{{ ($json.pdfText || '').substring(0, 4000) }}

Return ONLY this JSON, nothing else. "amount" should be the Grand Total, "taxable_amount" is the base amount before tax. If a tax is not present, return 0.
{
  "invoice_number": "string or null",
  "amount": number,
  "taxable_amount": number,
  "cgst_amount": number,
  "sgst_amount": number,
  "igst_amount": number,
  "billing_period_start": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "billing_period_end": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "line_items": [{"description": "", "quantity": 1, "unit_price": 0, "total": 0}],
  "anomaly_flags": []
}

options.systemMessage: You are an accounts payable data extractor. Extract invoice fields and return ONLY valid JSON with no explanation, no markdown, no code fences. For anomaly_flags include any of: 'Invoice number missing', 'Amount appears unusually high', 'Billing period dates unclear', 'Line items do not add up to total'.

nodes.name: Merge Dedup Result2
nodes.notes: Merges the Supabase check result with bill data so the IF node has everything it needs.

nodes.name: Is Duplicate Invoice?2
nodes.notes: TRUE (output 1) = not a duplicate → proceeds to Supabase Insert Bill. FALSE (output 2) = duplicate → goes to skip node.

nodes.name: Duplicate Invoice — Skip4
nodes.notes: Dead end. Workflow silently stops here. No insert, no approval email.

nodes.name: Is Duplicate Invoice Error?2
nodes.notes: Receives the error output (port 2) of Insert Bill. TRUE = duplicate invoice, silently skip. FALSE = a real unexpected error.

nodes.name: Unexpected DB Error — Stop2
nodes.notes: A real DB error that is NOT a duplicate. Check execution logs. Optionally wire to a Slack/email alert.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  vendor_id: $json.vendor_id,
  gmail_message_id: $json.gmail_message_id,
  invoice_number: $json.invoice_number,
  amount: $json.amount,
  taxable_amount: $json.taxable_amount,
  cgst_amount: $json.cgst_amount,
  sgst_amount: $json.sgst_amount,
  igst_amount: $json.igst_amount,
  billing_period_start: $json.billing_period_start,
  billing_period_end: $json.billing_period_end,
  line_items: $json.line_items,
  status: $json.status
}) }}

nodes.name: Supabase — Insert Bill5
nodes.notes: Continue On Fail is ON. Output 1 = success, Output 2 = error (caught by IF node below).

nodes.name: Duplicate Invoice — Skip5
nodes.notes: Dead end. Same invoice sent twice. Nothing inserted, no approval email sent.

parameters.subject: =🔔 Approval Required: Bill from {{ $if($('Check Vendor Exists2').isExecuted, $('Check Vendor Exists2').first().json.senderName, 'Vendor') }} — ₹{{ $if($('Prepare Bill for Insert2').isExecuted, $('Prepare Bill for Insert2').first().json.amount, '0') }}
parameters.bodyContent:
== Vendor Bill Approval

Vendor Bill Approval Required
Vendor {{ $('Check Vendor Exists2').first().json.vendor?.name || $('Check Vendor Exists2').first().json.senderName }}
Invoice # {{ $('Prepare Bill for Insert2').first().json.invoice_number }}
Amount ₹{{ $('Prepare Bill for Insert2').first().json.amount }}
Category{{ $('Fetch Agreement2').first().json.category || '—' }}
{{ $('Set Bill PDF URL2').first().json.bill_pdf_url ? '
📎 Invoice PDFView Original Invoice PDF
' : '' }}
Review & Approve on Dashboard
Approve / Reject is done from the signed-in billing dashboard. The decision is recorded against your account.

This approval link expires in 48 hours. Do not forward this email.

nodes.name: Supabase — Check Invoice Exists2
nodes.notes: Stage 2 dedup: checks vendor_id + invoice_number before inserting. Placed AFTER Prepare Bill for Insert, BEFORE Supabase — Insert Bill.
